\tzpentry{ID4442}{Quantum Zeta-Regularized Energy Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4442 introduces Quantum Zeta-Regularized Energy Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\langle \mathcal{E}_{\text{ZP}} \rangle = \frac{1}{2} \sum_{j \in \text{Nodes}} \hbar \omega_j \xrightarrow{\text{reg}} \zeta_{T}(-1) \cdot \mathcal{E}_p + \text{Res}(TZP)$$
